stories.title: Wawrinka's Final Match at Gstaad — A Swiss Legend Leaves the Stage He Started On

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Stan Wawrinka made his ATP debut at Gstaad.

On Tuesday, he played his last match there — losing to Faria 6-7(8), 6-4, 6-4.

Standing ovation. Former Davis Cup teammates on court. Custom skis. A send-off worthy of three Grand Slam titles. 🏆

#Tennis #TennisFanrecap #Gstaad

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Wawrinka at 41.

Three Slams. One of tennis's most beloved careers. Still competing on the ATP Tour.

The farewell tour continues — but Tuesday at Gstaad felt like a proper goodbye to the tournament that started it all.

#Tennis #TennisFanrecap #Wawrinka

article.headline: Gstaad Gave Wawrinka His Start. On Tuesday, It Said Goodbye.

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Wawrinka's Farewell at Gstaad

#### Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical)

**Visual Description:** Stan Wawrinka in a moment of emotion or reflection — post-match acknowledgment to crowd, arms raised or clasped, the body language of a player receiving appreciation. Not a match-action shot; the ceremony/acknowledgment energy.

**Imagn Search Terms (try in order):**
1. Stan Wawrinka Switzerland
2. Stan Wawrinka
3. Stan Wawrinka Roland Garros

**Text Overlay Copy:**
- Headline: "FAREWELL, STAN"
- Subtitle: "Wawrinka plays his final Gstaad match. Three Grand Slams. A career worth celebrating."
- Colors: Headline white on Clay Red (#B5451B) bar; subtitle warm gold (#F4C300)

**Composition Notes:**
- Warm, reflective energy — not a highlight shot but a human moment
- Bottom third clear for text overlay
- Let the player's expression carry the image

stories.title: Canadian Open Entry List: 71 of 72 Top Players Confirmed — Alcaraz Still Out

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Canadian Open entry list is out.

71 of 72 top ATP players confirmed — the strongest field in tournament history.

Sinner. Djokovic. Zverev. FAA on home soil.

One glaring absence: Alcaraz. Still no return date.

#ATP #TennisFanrecap #CanadianOpen

article.headline: Canadian Open: 71 of 72 Top Players In — Alcaraz the Only Notable Absence

stories.title: Clay Courts Day 3 — Dimitrov Wins in Bastad, Cobolli Enters Umag

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Day 3 of the post-Wimbledon clay swing:

Droguet upsets Blockx in Umag — 3-6, 6-2, 6-0 with drop shots and 77% first-serve efficiency.

Dimitrov wins in Bastad. Tsitsipas advances in Gstaad. Cobolli enters today in Umag.

Three courts. Zero days off.

#ATP #TennisFanrecap #Clay

article.headline: Clay Courts Day 3: Droguet Stuns Blockx, Dimitrov Advances, Cobolli Enters Umag

stories.title: WTA Athens Opens: Inaugural Edition Brings Grand Slam Returns and Sakkari's Home Crowd

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The WTA Athens Open is here.

First WTA event in Athens in 35 years. Maria Sakkari opened in front of her home crowd with a 6-0, 7-6(1) win.

New venue. No defending champion. And Greece's top player on center court. 🎾

#WTA #TennisFanrecap #Athens

article.headline: After 35 Years, WTA Tennis Returns to Athens — and Sakkari Is the Story

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
WTA Athens Inaugural

#### Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical)

**Visual Description:** Maria Sakkari mid-fist-pump or celebrating a point win — the energy of a player playing on home soil; proud, powerful, connected to the crowd.

**Imagn Search Terms (try in order):**
1. Maria Sakkari Greece
2. Maria Sakkari
3. Barbora Krejcikova Czech Republic

**Text Overlay Copy:**
- Headline: "HOME COURT"
- Subtitle: "WTA Athens opens. Sakkari wins 6-0 in front of her home crowd."
- Colors: Headline white; subtitle Championship Purple (#6A1B9A)

**Composition Notes:**

- Blue hard-court background if available; outdoor setting

stories.title: Alcaraz Wrist Update — Growing Fears His 2026 Season Could Be Over

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Alcaraz is not in the Canadian Open entry list.

He's now missed Roland-Garros, Wimbledon, and Canada — all from the same April wrist injury.

A video of him hitting at his academy surfaced. No timeline. No official date.

US Open is August 24. 🎾

#ATP #TennisFanrecap #Alcaraz

article.headline: Alcaraz Is Out of the Canadian Open. Is His 2026 Season Over?
